reviews.review_description: This game is super relaxing as well as easy to navigate. I can choose whether to draw and be creative or just relax while the spheres circle around me and the music plays. Overall would recommend to anyone who is looking for a relaxing experience.

reviews.review_title: The Most Relaxing VR Achievement Hunt
reviews.review_description: This is such a unique, artistic experience. I find myself drawing or adding shapes to the rhythm of the music. There's something really cool about flying around your artwork. There are also Quest Achievements - which is a breath of fresh air as it may be the first drawing app to include them!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! I'm really glad you're enjoying the relaxing, creative flow of Synephoria (and the achievements too!) I appreciate the support.  Enjoy Creating!

reviews.review_description: This experience is really something special which could only exist in VR - it blends Sound, colors and the opportunity to make art into a mesmerizing experience. It is a really relaxing app which is quite enjoyable. It feels like if the app give you synesthesia 😁 it also has some psychodelic vibes.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words.
I built Synephoria as a calm, creative space where sound and color meet, and it’s amazing to hear that it felt that way for you.
Really glad you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description: This game mixes painting with VR controls so well! It is one of the best games on my oculus library. 10/10 would recommend.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, Hud! That means a lot — I’m really glad you’re enjoying it and that the painting tools clicked with you. The solar-system build you mentioned sounds awesome 🌌 — keep creating!
